title: Page Sections

choices.1: Allow images to be opened in a lightbox

sub_fields.message: Note: Testimonials can be edited from the Testimonials option page.
Note: Logos can be edited from the Logos option page.

ai_description: Reusable flexible content fields that provide sections that can be positioned on most pages in any order. Sections available range from basic text content to more advanced features such as image carousels., Some sections may contain more specialized content intended reproduce unique features used in the site's design.
